scripts.test:integration:browser: npm run build && npm run test:integration:browser:built
scripts.test:core: npm run build && npm run test:core:built
scripts.test:conformance: npm run build && npm run test:conformance:built
scripts.fmt: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/src/main.js fmt examples
scripts.fmt:check: npm run build && npm run fmt:check:built
scripts.pack:virune: npm run clean && npm run build && node ./scripts/package.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run verify:metadata && npm run verify:quality
scripts.example: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/src/main.js run .
scripts.smoke:clone: npm run build && npm run smoke:clone:built
scripts.build:vscode: npm run build && npm run build:vscode:built
scripts.test:vscode:built: npm run build:vscode:built && npm --workspace virune-vscode test && npm --workspace @virune/language-server test && node scripts/smoke-vscode-server.mjs
scripts.test:vscode: npm run build && npm run test:vscode:built
scripts.test:binding-corpus: npm run build && npm run test:binding-corpus:built
scripts.test:fuzz:smoke: npm run build && npm run test:fuzz:smoke:built
scripts.benchmark:lsp: npm run build && npm run benchmark:lsp:built
scripts.benchmark:interop-heap: npm run build && npm run benchmark:interop-heap:built
scripts.verify:metadata: npm run node:check && npm run registry:check && npm run workflow:check && npm run test:workflow-policy && npm run docs:check && npm run release:check && npm run api:check && npm run abi:check && npm run test:public-abi && npm run test:release-gate && npm run spec:check
scripts.verify:quality: npm run check && npm run test:core:built && npm run test:integration:browser:built && npm run test:binding-corpus:built && npm run test:fuzz:smoke:built && npm run test:vscode:built && npm run test:conformance:built && npm run fmt:check:built && npm run smoke:clone:built && npm run test:performance-regression
scripts.verify:release: npm run pack:virune && npm run pack:vscode && npm run smoke:release
